Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_behavior_accel_otringal_discreet",
  "save": "otringal-open.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "An open outdoor Otringal city area suitable for forward movement testing.",
  "target_description": "Open walking space ahead of Twinsen, without an immediate wall or menu blocking movement.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "open",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_behavior_accel_otringal_discreet","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible near the lower center of the screen, facing into an open outdoor Otringal city walkway. The target area is visible because there is clear open walking space ahead with no immediate wall, dialog, or menu blocking movement. The UI state is gameplay, and there are no unsafe pose signs such as falling, clipping, combat impact, or incapacitation.","observed":{"twinsen_visible":true,"target_visible":true,"ui_state":"gameplay","unsafe_pose_signs":false},"mismatches":[]}
